entities.name: SEED VOUCHER AND SEED FAIR SYSTEM
entities.description: An approach where farmers are provided with vouchers to purchase seeds from various vendors at organized seed fairs

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: A country where the seed voucher and seed fair system was introduced

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A country where the seed voucher and seed fair system was introduced

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: A country where the seed voucher and seed fair system was introduced

entities.name: SUDAN
entities.description: A country where the seed voucher and seed fair system was introduced

entities.name: MOZAMBIQUE
entities.description: A country where the seed voucher and seed fair system was introduced

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: Agricultural producers who receive vouchers and purchase seeds at seed fairs

entities.name: VOUCHERS
entities.description: Documents with a specific cash value given to needy community members to exchange for seeds

entities.name: SEED FAIR
entities.description: An organized event where seeds are sold by farmers, small-scale traders, and large seed companies

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants available in various varieties at seed fairs

entities.name: LOCAL VARIETIES
entities.description: Traditional seed varieties available at seed fairs

entities.name: CERTIFIED SEED
entities.description: Seeds that have been officially certified for quality and purity

entities.name: MODERN VARIETIES
entities.description: Improved seed varieties available at seed fairs

entities.name: LOCAL SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: The regional infrastructure and market for seed production and distribution

entities.name: EMERGENCY SITUATIONS
entities.description: Contexts in which the seed voucher and seed fair system is implemented
